# Rules for AI Assistant

## Auto-generated files

The following files and directories are auto-generated from source code in other repositories. **DO NOT EDIT THEM DIRECTLY IN THIS REPOSITORY.**

If you need to make changes to the content of these pages, you must create a pull request against the appropriate source code repository.

### Swagger API Documentation

-   All files under `Swagger/**` are auto-generated.

### Environment Variable and Configuration Pages

The following pages are auto-generated:
-   `pages/tyk-oss-gateway/configuration.mdx`
-   `pages/tyk-dashboard/configuration.mdx`
-   `pages/tyk-pump/tyk-pump-configuration/tyk-pump-environment-variables.mdx`
-   `pages/tyk-multi-data-centre/mdcb-configuration-options.mdx`
-   `pages/tyk-configuration-reference/tyk-identity-broker-configuration.mdx`

### Imported Snippets

Any snippets imported into the above pages, such as `/snippets/gateway-config.mdx`, are also part of the auto-generated content and cannot be edited here.
